organic-your-bank-just-charged-you-47-to.hook: Your bank just charged you $47 to send $200 home. Here's what they don't want you to know.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator holds up phone showing a traditional wire-transfer fee receipt — '$47 fee' circled in red marker. Beat 2 (9-25s): Voiceover explains that Hundi/hawala exist because banks charge 15-25% — quick text overlay shows 'Nepal receives $9B/yr in remittances; $1B+ lost to fees.' Beat 3 (26-45s): Screen-record of Speed Wallet: type in $200, fee shows $0, recipient gets full $200 in seconds. Beat 4 (46-55s): Creator to camera — 'Download Speed, send your first dollar free, link in bio.' End card with QR code.
payload.production_notes: Film fee receipt close-up with natural light. Screen-record on iPhone via built-in recorder. No music needed — raw authenticity drives ER. Add red-circle annotation in CapCut free tier. Post Tuesday 7-9 PM EST (peak remittance audience online).

organic-i-sent-bitcoin-to-my-mom-in-4-se.hook: I sent Bitcoin to my mom in 4 seconds and she had cash in her hand in 10 minutes — no bank account needed.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Talking head, creator visibly excited — 'I did something my bank said was impossible.' Beat 2 (8-25s): Split-screen: left shows WhatsApp message from 'Mom' saying 'I got it!'; right shows Speed Wallet transaction confirmation with timestamp. Beat 3 (26-45s): Creator explains Lightning Network in plain English — 'It's like Venmo but global, instant, and the fee is literally zero cents.' Beat 4 (46-58s): CTA — 'Try it yourself, first send is on us, link in bio.' Overlay: 'Speed Wallet — Zero Fees Forever.'
payload.production_notes: Real WhatsApp screenshot adds authenticity — blur last name for privacy. Film in two takes: reaction shot first, screen-record second. Stitch together in CapCut. Caption: 'POV: you just disrupted Western Union.' Post Wednesday 6-8 PM EST.

organic-crypto-gave-me-financial-freedom.hook: Crypto gave me financial freedom — and I didn't need $10,000 to start.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Creator to camera, casual setting — 'Everyone thinks crypto is for whales. I started with $5.' Beat 2 (7-22s): Screen-record of Speed Wallet onboarding: download → create account → buy $5 of Bitcoin — total time shown as 90 seconds. Beat 3 (23-42s): Text-on-screen overlay: 'Bitcoin has been declared dead 472 times. It's at $X today.' Creator reacts — 'I wish I started sooner.' Beat 4 (43-58s): 'Speed Wallet makes it dead simple. No jargon, no minimums, no excuses. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Film in portrait, ring light optional. Use actual $5 onboarding live — don't fake it, authenticity is the hook. Add captions via Instagram's auto-caption tool. Hashtags: #Bitcoin #CryptoForBeginners #LightningNetwork #FinancialFreedom. Post Thursday 12-2 PM EST (Instagram Reels peak).

organic-pov-you-just-won-on-your-favorit.hook: POV: You just won on your favorite betting site and the withdrawal hit your wallet in 3 seconds.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): Phone screen shows a win notification from a popular iGaming site. Creator's hand pumps fist. Beat 2 (6-20s): Standard bank withdrawal screen shown — '3-5 business days, $15 fee.' Creator shakes head. Beat 3 (21-40s): Speed Wallet withdrawal screen: enter amount, tap send, confirmation appears — timestamp delta shown as 3 seconds. Creator: 'Lightning Network deposits and withdrawals. Instant. Zero fees. Every time.' Beat 4 (41-55s): 'Speed Wallet — download now, link in bio. Your winnings, your time.'
payload.production_notes: Use a generic/non-branded win screen to avoid platform ad policy issues. Film withdrawal comparison as a side-by-side using CapCut split-screen template. Keep energy high — quick cuts. Do NOT show gambling content explicitly; focus on payment speed. Post Friday 8-10 PM EST (iGaming activity peaks on weekends).

organic-reply-to-user-what-even-is-the-l.hook: Reply to @user: What even IS the Lightning Network? I'll show you in 45 seconds.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): Show a stitched comment — 'I keep hearing Lightning Network but idk what it is?' Creator: 'Great question, let me show you.' Beat 2 (6-20s): Simple animation (drawn on-screen via CapCut): Bitcoin blockchain = slow highway; Lightning = express lane built on top. '1-second transactions, fractions of a cent fee.' Beat 3 (21-38s): Screen-record: send $1 via Speed Wallet Lightning to a friend — confirmation in under 2 seconds. Beat 4 (39-52s): Creator: 'Speed Wallet is the easiest Lightning app. Download free, send $1 to anyone on the planet right now.' Overlay: '#LightningNetwork #Bitcoin #SpeedWallet'
payload.production_notes: Use TikTok's native 'Reply to comment' feature for algorithmic boost — stitch a real comment or seed one from a secondary account. CapCut's draw-on-screen tool handles the animation at $0 cost. This format indexes highly for saves (educational). Post Saturday 10 AM-12 PM EST.

paid-you-just-lost-47-sending-200-home-a.hook: You just lost $47 sending $200 home. Again.
paid-you-just-lost-47-sending-200-home-a.estimate: $1.80-$2.40 (30-43% below $3.17 benchmark — high-intent audience with acute fee pain, direct product-problem match drives strong CTR)

payload.problem: B-roll of wire transfer receipt with fee highlighted. VO: 'Every time you send money home through a bank or Western Union, you're handing over 10, 15, sometimes 25% in fees. That's money your family never sees.'
payload.solution: Screen-record of Speed Wallet: send $200, fee line reads $0.00, recipient confirmation in 4 seconds. VO: 'Speed Wallet uses Bitcoin Lightning — the same amount you send is the exact amount that arrives. Instant. Zero fees. Every single time.'
payload.cta: Download Speed. Send your first transfer free. Zero fees forever.
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram): Latino/Filipino/South Asian diaspora, ages 22-45, US-based, interests: international money transfer, Western Union, Remitly, MoneyGram, 'sending money home'

paid-everyone-s-talking-about-bitcoin-he.hook: Everyone's talking about Bitcoin. Here's how to actually use it in 90 seconds.
paid-everyone-s-talking-about-bitcoin-he.estimate: $2.50-$3.10 (near benchmark — broad but highly engaged demographic; creator-style UGC format beats polished ads on TikTok by 20-30% on CPI)

payload.problem: Talking head, relatable creator: 'I wanted to try Bitcoin but every app felt like it was designed by rocket scientists. Confusing wallets, seed phrases, gas fees — I gave up three times.' Cut to frustrated face scrolling a complex exchange UI.
payload.solution: Screen-record of Speed Wallet onboarding: download → sign up → buy $5 Bitcoin → send to a friend. VO: 'Speed Wallet is the first Bitcoin app that just works. No jargon. No minimums. Your first $5 is on us.' Show full flow in real-time under 90 seconds.
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet free. Start with $5. No experience needed.
payload.audience: TikTok Ads: ages 18-34, interests: personal finance, investing basics, Cash App, Robinhood, 'how to invest', crypto-curious but not crypto-native; lookalike from Speed's existing user base

paid-your-withdrawal-is-still-processing.hook: Your withdrawal is still 'processing.' It's been 4 days.
paid-your-withdrawal-is-still-processing.estimate: $2.20-$2.80 (12-31% below benchmark — niche high-LTV segment with strong payment frustration, direct urgency message drives high conversion intent)

payload.problem: Split screen: left — iGaming win notification with confetti; right — bank account showing 'pending' for 4 days. VO: 'You won. You earned it. But your payment processor is holding your money hostage with delays, fees, and limits. Sound familiar?'
payload.solution: Speed Wallet screen-record: iGaming site withdrawal via Lightning → Speed Wallet balance updates in 3 seconds. VO: 'Speed Wallet supports instant Bitcoin Lightning deposits and withdrawals at any Lightning-compatible gaming site. Your money moves when you say so — not when your bank feels like it.'
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Instant in, instant out.
payload.audience: Meta (Facebook + Instagram): males 21-40, US-based, interests: online poker, sports betting, DraftKings, FanDuel, casino games, Bitcoin gambling; exclude minors via age gate; run only in states with legal iGaming
